'''''Big Eye''''' was a [[GAT-12 Skipray Blastboat]] converted into a sensor platform that was used by the [[New Jedi Order]]. Flown by [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]], it was used in a [[Battle in the Froz system|mission]] to capture a [[voxyn]] in space around the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Froz]]. The mission conincided with [[Kyp Durron]]'s [[Kyp's Dozen|Dozen-and-Two Avengers]], who shared their [[Jedi shadow bomb|shadow bomb]] technique.

{{Ship-stub}}
